cpu_schema.rationale: Static weight evaluation misclassifies adversarial inputs at low confidence and under-penalizes governance failures at high confidence. KAPPA v3.5 introduces per-record confidence gating to normalize evaluation quality across heterogeneous batches.
cpu_schema.trigger_condition: Confidence score emitted by detect_input_category() falls into one of three bands: ≥0.28 (strong), 0.25–0.28 (blended), <0.25 (fallback). Adversarial category always routes to apply_strong regardless of confidence.
cpu_schema.passing_state: Record scored with correct weight regime; routing decision logged per record; adversarial inputs never reach fallback_balanced. governance_clear target ≥95% across 100-pass validation.
cpu_schema.failing_state: governance_clear < 95% (current: 82.6% — tracked as S033-BLG-01). Adversarial inputs reaching fallback_balanced. Confidence detection bias causing systematic mismatch.
cpu_schema.recovery_protocol: v3.6 will address governance_clear gap via refined threshold calibration. Sentinel annotation (P-29 candidate) will flag adversarial fallback as a hard risk_block rather than risk_warn. Apogee P-11 11Q score to be run in S034 (S033-BLG-03).
references: DGAF Gate Spec v1.0: governance-first evaluation pipeline
EU AI Act Article 9: risk management and quality management systems
